name: react-hono-tanstackdb-duckdb

scripts.dev: concurrently -n css,app -c magenta,cyan "bun run dev:css" "bun run dev:api"
scripts.build: bun run build:css && bun run build:html
scripts.preview: bun run build && bun run start
scripts.test:ci: bun test $(rg --files src api/db --glob '*.test.ts' --glob '!src/collections/instances-singleton.test.ts') api/server.test.ts api/repository-prepared-statements.test.ts api/duckdb-rollover.integration.test.ts
scripts.format:check: bunx prettier --check package.json eslint.config.js '.github/**/*.{yml,yaml,md}' scripts/agent-readiness/*.ts scripts/telegram-notify.ts api/telegram-alerts.ts api/telegram-alerts.test.ts api/routes/client-errors.ts src/lib/error-tracking.ts 'docs/openapi.yaml' 'docs/privacy-and-pii.md' 'docs/runbooks/**/*.md'
scripts.format:write: bunx prettier --write package.json eslint.config.js '.github/**/*.{yml,yaml,md}' scripts/agent-readiness/*.ts scripts/telegram-notify.ts api/telegram-alerts.ts api/telegram-alerts.test.ts api/routes/client-errors.ts src/lib/error-tracking.ts 'docs/openapi.yaml' 'docs/privacy-and-pii.md' 'docs/runbooks/**/*.md'
scripts.test:ci:report: mkdir -p .artifacts && bun test $(rg --files src api/db --glob '*.test.ts' --glob '!src/collections/instances-singleton.test.ts') api/server.test.ts api/repository-prepared-statements.test.ts api/duckdb-rollover.integration.test.ts --reporter=junit --reporter-outfile .artifacts/test-results.xml
scripts.test:flake-check: bun test --rerun-each=3 --randomize $(rg --files src api/db --glob '*.test.ts' --glob '!src/collections/instances-singleton.test.ts') api/server.test.ts api/repository-prepared-statements.test.ts api/duckdb-rollover.integration.test.ts
scripts.test:coverage:ci: bun test $(rg --files src api/db --glob '*.test.ts' --glob '!src/collections/instances-singleton.test.ts') api/server.test.ts api/repository-prepared-statements.test.ts api/duckdb-rollover.integration.test.ts --coverage --coverage-reporter=lcov --coverage-dir .artifacts/coverage && bun scripts/agent-readiness/check-coverage-threshold.ts

_: For some reason, sst requires esbuild 0.25.0 when deploying the permission deployer
